title: Fix daily run CI failures on win installer task
body:
Fixes #18048 

This is a regression from #18018: CIRRUS_PR_BODY doesn't exist on a non-PR run, so it wasn't triggered in PR verification. Change this and all other env removals to ignore non-existing entries.

```release-note
none
```

LGTM.  Thanks!  /me scratches head wondering why ignoring errors isn't the default for remove!  Non-existence is the goal! :man_shrugging:
@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL.  This fixes daily failures of cirrus-cron jobs.
